heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 274g Authorization of appropriations
text: For the purpose of carrying out this part, there are authorized to be appropriated $8,000,000 for fiscal year 1991, and such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1992 and 1993.
notes: Amendments1998— made technical amendment relating to placement of section within part H of this subchapter.Pub. L. 105–196
amendments: Amendments1998— made technical amendment relating to placement of section within part H of this subchapter.Pub. L. 105–196
